text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unchanged by her debut, Agnes Tachyon
continues to put her research first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I develop a three-year race
schedule which would see her through the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reviews the schedule, but insists that, in order
to prioritize her research, she'll decide for herself
which races to enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, my efforts succeed in turning her attention
toward the Classics and its preliminary race, the
Yayoi Sho.
